name: Dagwood Italiano
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Roast red and green bell peppers in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until skins are slightly charred and shriveled. Remove from oven, transfer to a plate, wrap with plastic wrap, and let stand 10 minutes.
3. Remove peppers from plastic wrap, peel off skin, remove seeds, and cut into strips. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine rosemary (1 t), half of the olive oil, minced garlic, red wine or broth; add lamb and marinate for 1 hour.
5. Heat remaining olive oil in a large nonstick skillet. Add lamb and sear on all sides.
6. Place lamb on a rack in a shallow roasting pan. Insert meat thermometer into the center of the lamb and roast at 375°F until internal temperature reaches 140°F, about 27-34 minutes, or to desired doneness. Alternatively, grill for 15-20 minutes.
7. To construct sandwiches, thinly slice lamb and arrange on four slices of bread. Alternate with red and green pepper strips. Top with mozzarella cheese and Parmesan cheese.
8. Place under broiler until cheeses melt, bubble, and turn light brown. Add top halves of bread and serve.
Calories: 344
Protein: 30g
Carbohydrates: 32g
Fat: 10g
Fiber: 1g
Cholesterol: 78mg
Sodium: 360mg
